How it was actually run · Appendix AA.3
4

Every cell compared — engine by engine

Beer Sheva · 4 grids

Thesis · pvlib · PVWatts · mean-abs-deviation — each 24 h × 12 months = 288 cells. All four cities (AA.3–AA.6).

Cell-by-cell, not aggregated

Compared one cell at a time; daytime cells agree to a few %.

The "–" cells

Night / edge hours near zero — excluded from the % deviation.

Nothing is hidden by aggregation — every headline number traces back to cells like these.
